title: 'Achaz #0271
definition:
Ahaz = "he has grasped"

 1) king of Judah, son Jotham, father of Hezekiah
 2) a Benjamite, son of Micah, and great grandson of Jonathan
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ahaz = "he has grasped"

 1) king of Judah, son Jotham, father of Hezekiah
 2) a Benjamite, son of Micah, and great grandson of Jonathan

    NASB:  he has grasped, two Isr.
